{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eye
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye]] is an artifact that points to distant locations.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Harmony]] shoved the [[Eye]] into a cage.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye]] is a [[construct]] that can speak.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
